output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tunnel WHERE {
  ?tunnel wdt:P31 wd:Q130789 ; wdt:P2049 ?length .
  ?length wikibase:quantityAmount ?value ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q363784 .
  FILTER(?value > 13000)
}
